The '''Heritage Fleet''' was the military force of the [[Heritage Council]] of [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. Their flagship was the ''[[Kendall]]'' and included around seventy capital ships, including [[Nova-class battle cruiser|''Nova''-class battle cruisers]], the dozen [[House AlGray]] [[Hapan Battle Dragon|Battle Dragons]], and the [[Galney fleet]]. Its [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] included [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] and [[Miy'til starfighter]]s.

Although bolstered by a [[Five Worlds]] fleet, it was defeated at the [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Hapes]] after [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Zekk]] discovered the plot while investigating [[Ducha]] [[Lalu Morwan]].

The remaining ships of the Heritage Fleet joined the [[Confederation]].
